subcodes.first_line: Say: The Husbandman hath come, and the Light hath appeared, illumining thereby the hearts of such as have detached themselves from all else but God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل قد اتی الفلاح و ظهر المصباح و استضائت منه افئده الذین انقطعوا عما سوی الله
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @suffering and imprisonment
